Our Faculty Member Ali Osman Kuşakcı Appointed as Rector of the International University of Sarajevo

15.08.2025

Prof. Dr. Ali Osman Kuşakcı, a faculty member of our Department of Management and Director of School of Graduate Studies, has assumed his new position as Rector at the International University of Sarajevo.

In addition to his role as a faculty member in our University’s Department of Management, Prof. Dr. Ali Osman Kuşakcı has also been serving as the Head of the Department of Air Transportation Management and Director of the School of Graduate Studies. He has now been appointed as the Rector of the International University of Sarajevo.

Prof. Kuşakcı officially assumed the position from Prof. Dr. Ahmet Yıldırım during a handover ceremony held on Wednesday, August 13, 2025.

We congratulate Prof. Dr. Ali Osman Kuşakcı and wish him success in his new role.
